product_name: Orion Aluminum Case w/ Telescope Eyepieces & 1.25" Color-Filter Set
attributes: Orion • Aluminum Hard Case + Key • 1.25" Eyepieces (bagged) • Color Planetary Filter Set • Like-New
condition_notes: Orion (Orion Telescopes & Binoculars) silver aluminum hard case — foam egg-crate lid, fitted lower tray, latches and key. Contents: several 1.25" telescope eyepieces (factory-bagged; focal lengths not yet recorded) and an Orion 1.25" color planetary filter set in hinged cases (incl. #12 Yellow). Accessories appear unused/like-new. Sold as one lot. Compare ~$180 to assemble new piecemeal (case ~$40 + 4-color filter set $50 + eyepieces).

square.buy_link_note: Square checkout 2026-06-19: $65 + $16 flat shipping = $81; asks for shipping address.
